bird.name: 黃胸擬管舌鳥
bird.summary: 黃胸擬管舌鳥（學名Loxioides bailleui）是夏威夷的一種雀。它們的頭部及胸部都呈金黃色，腹部較淺色，背部灰色，雙翼及尾巴呈綠色。它們與Sophora chrysophylla這種樹有緊密的生態關係，由於夏威夷乾旱森林的破壞而同時瀕危。 特徵 黃胸擬管舌鳥的頭部及胸…

relations.subject: 黃胸擬管舌鳥
relations.evidence: thumb|left|Closeup (probably of an adult female) The palila favors a māmane and māmane-naio (Myoporum sandwicense) dry forest habitat mix containing, apart from the forest, patches of grasslands, pūkiawe (Styphelia tameiameiae) shrubland on lava fields, and other types of native understory vegetation
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 黃胸擬管舌鳥
relations.evidence: thumb|left|Closeup (probably of an adult female) The palila favors a māmane and māmane-naio (Myoporum sandwicense) dry forest habitat mix containing, apart from the forest, patches of grasslands, pūkiawe (Styphelia tameiameiae) shrubland on lava fields, and other types of native understory vegetation
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 黃胸擬管舌鳥
relations.evidence: A 2025 study concluded: "Perhaps the hardest threat to combat is climate change, because Palila population declines are strongly associated with severe drought events that suppress māmane reproduction."
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
